github.copilot.chat.commitMessageGenerat.text: Write commit messages using the Conventional Commits format: type(scope): description. Types: feat, fix, refactor, chore, docs, style. Include a blank line then a body that lists specific changes as bullet points. Mention component names, file names, and what was added/changed/removed. Be detailed — summarize every meaningful change, not just the first one. If multiple components or pages were affected, list them all.
